# world

**Instance Property**

The namespace in which the JavaScript code executes.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var world: WKContentWorld { get }
```

## Discussion

For more information about content worlds, see [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKContentWorld].

## Getting Message-Related Information

- **frameInfo**: The frame that sent the message.
- **webView**: The web view that sent the message.
